NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-08-2016 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-05-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-08-2016 - AT TRIAL CALL, CASE WAS ASSIGNED TO MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH COURT SETTLEMENT OFFICER, PANG LY, SET FOR 2/9/16 AT 1:30 PM. AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 2/9/16, DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL, JOHN CHU, ESQ., APPEARED WITH DEFENDANT VIVIAN GONG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, JEFFREY CHEN, ESQ. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS MING SHAN KONG AND ANY REPRESENTATIVE OF G FLOR, INC. CASE RETURNED TO DEPT. 206 DUE TO PLAINTIFFS' NON-APPEARANCE AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
